calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees Re Petition For Decree To Release Property From Lien; Declaration Points And Authorities And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Deborah Abernathy, Esq., of Bullivant Houser Bailey, 352-2725, for Petitioner and Moving Party
John Malek, 441-3416, Respondent in Propria Persona and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER TIGRAN SHAHSUVARYAN'S Motion For Attorney Fees Re Petition For Decree To Release Property From Lien was granted. Attorney Fees and Costs were awarded in the amount of $2,000. Order signed in open court. (301/JLW/dm) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. DEBORAH ABERNATHY OF BULLIVANT. HOUSE AND BAILEY, TEL. NO. 352-2725 FOR TIGRAN SHAHSUVARYAN;
JOHN MALEK- APPEARING IMPROPER;

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- PETITIONER TIGRAN SHAHSUVARYAN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. DOCUMENTS WERE SERVED 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE HEARING BUT BY MAIL WHICH REQUIRES AN ADDITIONAL 5 CALENDAR DAYS PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005 (B) =(301/JLW) JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558
